ISSUE_2_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified the missing supplier address as a compliance issue. While not explicitly listed as a separate required field in the knowledge base, it's implicitly required as part of the "ICP company details on invoice" rule, which states that proper business documentation is needed.

ISSUE_3_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified the missing invoice number as a compliance issue, citing the knowledge base reference that "Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices; booking confirmations will not be sufficient." This is accurate as proper documentation requires identifiable invoice numbers.

ISSUE_4_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified the missing ICP company details as a compliance issue. This directly references the knowledge base rule stating "Invoice must show Global PPL CH GmbH, Freigutstrasse 2 8002 Zürich, Switzerland CHE-295.369.918 - The Local Employer's name and details should appear on invoices."

ISSUE_5_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified that the office supplies expense of CHF 62.9 exceeds the maximum tax-free limit of CHF 20, which would make it subject to tax. This directly references the knowledge base rule stating "Smaller business expenses tax-free can be reimbursed against receipts (e.g. expenses that occur during a business trip) of a maximum of CHF 20 - amounts above this limit may be subject to tax."

CONFIDENCE: 100
